questions.question: How many men were chosen to serve tables so the apostles could focus on prayer and ministry of the word?
Who was described as full of faith and the Holy Spirit and was one of the seven chosen?
The complaint that led to choosing the seven was that Hebrew-speaking widows were being overlooked in the daily distribution.
Stephen, full of grace and _____, performed great wonders and signs among the people.
All who sat in the council, looking steadfastly at Stephen, saw his face like the face of an _____.
